mnemonics: My Nice Mother Justifies Seeing Cats Sleep
keyPoints: Let's start with a general form of the equation: an^2 + bn + c = 0
The characteristic equation is obtained by substituting n with the variable r
The roots of the characteristic equation are distinct and not equal to zero
The solution to the recurrence relation is a linear combination of the two roots
The general solution is of the form: an*r1^n + bn*r2^n
